query:
SELECT 'books_demo' AS tbl, COUNT(*) AS n FROM books WHERE title LIKE 'Test %' OR title LIKE '%demo%' OR title LIKE '%placeholder%' OR title LIKE '%fake%'
UNION ALL SELECT 'assignmentSubmissions_demo',COUNT(*) FROM assignmentSubmissions WHERE COALESCE(title,'') LIKE '%demo%' OR COALESCE(title,'') LIKE '%placeholder%' OR COALESCE(title,'') LIKE '%fake%' OR COALESCE(title,'') LIKE 'Test %'
UNION ALL SELECT 'books_total', COUNT(*) FROM books
UNION ALL SELECT 'assignmentSubmissions_total', COUNT(*) FROM assignmentSubmissions
UNION ALL SELECT 'moodLogs_total', COUNT(*) FROM moodLogs
UNION ALL SELECT 'moodSignals_total', COUNT(*) FROM moodSignals
UNION ALL SELECT 'powerschool_grades_total', COUNT(*) FROM powerschool_grades;
